name: Logic & Critical Thinking
subtitle: Argument Quality
description: Evaluate arguments, assumptions, contradictions, and weak claims.
title: Logic & Critical Thinking
shortDescription: Evaluate arguments, assumptions, contradictions, and weak claims.
coachingLens: argument structure, assumptions, consistency, fallacies, and missing evidence

name: Epistemology
subtitle: Truth & Evidence
description: Ask how we know what is true and how much certainty is justified.
title: Epistemology
shortDescription: Ask how we know what is true and how much certainty is justified.
purpose: Train users to ask how they know something is true.
coachingLens: source quality, proof, certainty, evidence strength, and what would change the user's mind

name: Ethics & Moral Reasoning
subtitle: Fairness & Duty
description: Reason through fairness, duty, harm, responsibility, and consequences.
title: Ethics & Moral Reasoning
shortDescription: Reason through fairness, duty, harm, responsibility, and consequences.
purpose: Train users to reason through right, wrong, fairness, duty, responsibility, and consequences.
coachingLens: moral tradeoffs, who is helped, who is harmed, principles, consequences, and fairness

name: Strategic Thinking
subtitle: Long Game
description: Think several moves ahead before choosing.
title: Strategic Thinking
shortDescription: Think several moves ahead before choosing.
purpose: Train users to think several moves ahead.
coachingLens: second-order effects, unintended consequences, leverage, timing, tradeoffs, and incentives

name: Street Lessons
subtitle: Hard-Earned Judgment
description: Practical wisdom about people, power, incentives, risk, respect, trust, manipulation, and the real-world consequences of poor decisions.
title: Street Lessons
shortDescription: Practical wisdom about people, power, incentives, risk, respect, trust, manipulation, and the real-world consequences of poor decisions.
purpose: Train practical judgment when people, pressure, reputation, trust, and consequences matter.
coachingLens: trust, leverage, motives, pressure, practical risk, reputation, and real-world consequences

name: Financial Judgment
subtitle: Money Decisions
description: Make better decisions about money, risk, debt, and time.
title: Financial Judgment
shortDescription: Make better decisions about money, risk, debt, and time.
coachingLens: risk, return, liquidity, opportunity cost, incentives, cash flow, and time horizon

name: Leadership & Influence
subtitle: Trust & Accountability
description: Lead, communicate, persuade, and build trust responsibly.
title: Leadership & Influence
shortDescription: Lead, communicate, persuade, and build trust responsibly.
purpose: Train users to lead, communicate, and influence responsibly.
coachingLens: trust, clarity, accountability, morale, influence, and consequences for the team

name: Media & Information Literacy
subtitle: Signals & Framing
description: Evaluate headlines, framing, sources, bias, and missing context.
title: Media & Information Literacy
shortDescription: Evaluate headlines, framing, sources, bias, and missing context.
coachingLens: framing, missing context, source incentives, bias, evidence, fact versus opinion, and persuasion

name: Science & Evidence
subtitle: Causation & Proof
description: Understand studies, uncertainty, causation, and evidence quality.
title: Science & Evidence
shortDescription: Understand studies, uncertainty, causation, and evidence quality.
purpose: Train users to understand studies, claims, and evidence.
coachingLens: study design, controls, correlation, causation, uncertainty, sample size, and evidence quality

name: History & Civilization
subtitle: Patterns Over Time
description: Learn from historical events, leaders, institutions, and consequences.
title: History & Civilization
shortDescription: Learn from historical events, leaders, institutions, and consequences.
purpose: Train users to learn from historical patterns.
coachingLens: historical context, patterns, parallels, what changed, what repeats, and leadership decisions

name: Technology & AI
subtitle: Future Tradeoffs
description: Think clearly about AI, privacy, automation, algorithms, and tradeoffs.
title: Technology & AI
shortDescription: Think clearly about AI, privacy, automation, algorithms, and tradeoffs.
purpose: Train users to think clearly about technology's impact.
coachingLens: tradeoffs, incentives, risks, benefits, future consequences, and human behavior around technology

name: Creativity & Innovation
subtitle: Useful Reframing
description: Reframe problems, test ideas, and create practical alternatives.
title: Creativity & Innovation
shortDescription: Reframe problems, test ideas, and create practical alternatives.
purpose: Train users to reframe problems and generate better ideas.
coachingLens: reframing, constraints, experiments, alternatives, practical creativity, and testing ideas

name: Work, Purpose & Ambition
subtitle: Career & Discipline
description: Think clearly about career, discipline, sacrifice, purpose, and success.
title: Work, Purpose & Ambition
shortDescription: Think clearly about career, discipline, sacrifice, purpose, and success.
purpose: Train users to think clearly about career, effort, discipline, goals, sacrifice, and success.
coachingLens: tradeoffs, timing, discipline, long-term goals, risk, purpose, and ambition

name: Identity & Human Behavior
subtitle: Self-Awareness
description: Build self-awareness around emotions, habits, bias, and behavior patterns.
title: Identity & Human Behavior
shortDescription: Build self-awareness around emotions, habits, bias, and behavior patterns.
coachingLens: emotions, habits, self-awareness, bias, identity, defensiveness, and behavior patterns

name: Literature & Timeless Wisdom
subtitle: Story & Human Nature
description: Use stories, books, proverbs, and classic ideas to understand life.
title: Literature & Timeless Wisdom
shortDescription: Use stories, books, proverbs, and classic ideas to understand life.
purpose: Train users to pull practical lessons from stories, quotes, books, and classic ideas.
coachingLens: human nature, timeless lessons, character choices, wisdom, story patterns, and practical application
